final:
// // This module implements a 1-bit SRAM cell with a data input 'd', a data output 'q', a write enable signal 'we', and a clock signal 'clk'. When 'we' is high on the falling edge of 'clk', the input data 'd' is written to the cell. When 'we' is low, the output 'q' holds the stored value of the cell.
module sram_cell (
    input wire d,
    input wire we,
    input wire clk,
    output reg q
);
    always @(posedge clk) begin
        if (we) begin
            q <= d;  // Write operation
        end
        // else no action, hold the current value
    end
endmodule
